data.title: Canadian residents fall victim to a series of cryptocurrency scams, with fraudsters impersonating Royal Canadian Mounted Police (RCMP) officers to carry out secondary fraud.
data.description: A resident of Nanaimo, Canada, was scammed late last year after receiving a text message promoting remote stock trading. He deposited approximately CAD 5,000 (about USD 3,600) into a cryptocurrency ATM. Earlier this year, the victim saw an online message masquerading as an RCMP announcement encouraging fraud victims to report the crime. After submitting a form, a person claiming to be a lawyer called, saying they had found two cryptocurrency accounts linked to the victim and could help recover approximately USD 60,000 in alleged gains. Gary O'Brien, RCMP Media Relations Officer in Nanaimo, stated that the RCMP will not contact individuals regarding discovered cryptocurrency accounts, will not cooperate with private companies to recover lost funds, and will not request any form of payment to investigate fraud. Andy Zhou, co-founder and CEO of blockchain security company BlockSec, stated that this type of tactic, known as a "fake recovery service scam," is systematic. Scammers typically possess victim information gathered from the original scam, and organized fraud groups circulate lists of victims who have already sent money, making these individuals targets for secondary scams. Impersonating law enforcement agencies is effective because it exploits the psychological mechanism of "authority bias." Canadian police have been conducting cryptocurrency investigation training since 2022.

data.title: BitMart's "BM Discover" section now features Pigeon Doctor (PIGEON).
data.description: BitMart's "BM Discovery" section listed Pigeon Doctor (PIGEON) on March 5th at 11:30 AM (UTC+8), and launched the PIGEON/USDT trading pair. Pigeon Doctor is a meme project (DOCTOR PIGEON) on Solana, currently mainly traded on PumpSwap, and positioned as a community-driven, promotional token.

data.title: AI Integration in Gaming: NetEase's Innovative Approach
data.description: NetEase's latest game, 'Yan Yun Shi Liu Sheng,' features over 10,000 AI-driven non-player characters (NPCs), showcasing a pioneering use of artificial intelligence in gaming. According to Jin10, Daiwa reports that this technological application is difficult for other game developers to replicate, suggesting that the development cycle for major games still requires approximately five years, with AI's impact on development timelines currently limited. Daiwa reiterates a 'buy' rating for NetEase, maintaining a target price of HKD 257 based on SOTP calculations. In the long term, Daiwa anticipates that revenue growth from NetEase's classic game licenses will not accelerate significantly, with the launch of free servers for 'Fantasy Westward Journey' likely providing a one-time boost. Additionally, Daiwa believes NetEase's dual primary listing has structural benefits, and future inclusion in the Hong Kong Stock Connect could enhance stock liquidity and reduce long-term listing risks.

data.title: U.S. Markets Show Strength Amid Global Challenges
data.description: Bloomberg posted on X that the U.S. markets are currently demonstrating resilience, with America emerging as a winner in the global economic landscape. However, this success comes at a time when other regions are facing significant challenges. The current market dynamics highlight a disparity between the U.S. and other global economies, which are struggling to keep pace. Analysts suggest that while the U.S. continues to perform well, the broader international market is experiencing difficulties, impacting various sectors worldwide. This situation underscores the complex interplay between domestic success and international economic pressures.

data.title: Market Data Analysis Shows Similar Trends in Year-to-Date Returns
data.description: The Long View, institutional investor, posted on X that recent data from MS PB indicates that market trends are aligning closely with previous analyses. The data, which is updated daily, suggests that despite occasional fluctuations, the year-to-date returns remain consistent with earlier projections through the end of February. This analysis highlights the stability in market performance, even when accounting for less favorable trading days.

data.title: Kraken became the first crypto company to gain access to the Federal Reserve's core payment system, making it the first cryptocurrency company capable of transferring funds like a bank.
data.description: Kraken Financial, the banking arm of Kraken, has received approval from the Federal Reserve for a "master account," becoming the first crypto company to access the Fed's core payment system and gain access to the same payment channels as thousands of banks and credit unions. This account will allow Kraken Financial direct access to Fedwire, the interbank payment system that processes over $4 trillion in transactions daily; previously, the arm relied on intermediary banks for fund transfers. Kraken Financial holds a special banking license in Wyoming specifically for crypto companies, and this approval grants limited master account privileges, excluding all services enjoyed by banks, such as earning interest on reserves held at the Fed. The Federal Reserve Bank of Kansas City reviewed the application and announced its approval on Wednesday. Kraken co-CEO Arjun Sethi stated that this move will improve the reliability and efficiency of fiat currency deposits entering and leaving the digital asset market. Banking groups have criticized the decision. Paige Pidano Paridon, co-head of regulatory affairs at the Bank Policy Institute, stated that the decision lacks transparency in the approval process and risk mitigation measures. Kraken, founded in 2011, completed a funding round last November at a $20 billion valuation and has filed for an IPO. (WSJ)

data.title: Efforts to Neutralize Iran's Mobile Missile Launch Capabilities Continue
data.description: The U.S. Central Command has announced ongoing efforts to eliminate the mobile missile launch capabilities of the Iranian regime. According to Jin10, these operations are being conducted with lethal precision to identify and destroy potential threats. The focus remains on maintaining regional stability and security by addressing these missile threats effectively.

data.title: Thailand Approves Emergency LNG Procurement to Ensure Power Stability
data.description: Thailand's Energy Regulatory Commission has approved an urgent amendment to its fuel procurement plan, adding three batches of spot LNG shipments for March and April to ensure the stability of the power system. According to Jin10, this decision comes amid concerns over energy supply and the need to maintain reliable electricity services. The move highlights Thailand's proactive approach to addressing potential energy shortages and securing necessary resources to support its infrastructure.

data.title: OKX launches ROBO spot trading.
data.description: OKX has launched ROBO (Fabric Protocol) spot trading.

data.title: STOCKS | Coal India Shares Rise 3.3%, Leading NIFTY 50 Index
data.description: Coal India, a major player in the coal industry, saw its shares increase by 3.3%, making it the leading stock in the NIFTY 50 index. According to Jin10, this rise in stock price highlights the company's strong performance in the market. The NIFTY 50 index, which tracks the performance of 50 prominent companies listed on the National Stock Exchange of India, was positively impacted by Coal India's gains. This development reflects investor confidence in Coal India's operations and its potential for future growth.

data.title: CENTCOM Requests Additional Intelligence Personnel for Iran Operations
data.description: The U.S. Central Command (CENTCOM) has requested the Pentagon to deploy more military intelligence personnel to its headquarters in Tampa, Florida, to support operations targeting Iran. According to Jin10, this deployment is expected to last at least 100 days, with the possibility of extending until September. The move underscores the ongoing focus on Iran within U.S. military strategy.

data.title: Ukraine's Use of U.S. Funds and Military Aid Discussed
data.description: The Long View, institutional investor, posted on X that Ukraine has received $100 billion in funds from the United States. The post suggests that without this financial and military support, Ukraine might not have been able to sustain its defense efforts. The discussion highlights the significant role of U.S. aid in Ukraine's ongoing conflict and its impact on the country's ability to resist external pressures.

data.title: Israeli President Herzog Clarifies War Objectives in the Middle East
data.description: Israeli President Isaac Herzog stated that the ongoing conflict is not aimed at changing Iran's regime but rather at transforming the Middle East. According to Jin10, Herzog emphasized the strategic goals of the war, focusing on regional stability and security. He highlighted the importance of addressing broader geopolitical challenges in the area. Herzog's remarks come amid heightened tensions and complex dynamics in the Middle East, where various nations are navigating alliances and conflicts. The president's statement seeks to clarify Israel's position and objectives in the current geopolitical landscape.

data.title: U.S. Energy Secretary Downplays Impact of Iran Conflict on Energy Markets
data.description: U.S. Energy Secretary Wright has stated that the impact of the Iran conflict on energy markets is temporary and a minor cost for achieving military objectives. According to Jin10, the recent airstrikes by the U.S. and Israel on Iran, followed by Tehran's response, have heightened regional tensions and disrupted shipping in the Strait of Hormuz. This disruption has affected the crucial oil and gas transport routes in the Middle East, leading to increased energy prices. Concerns over a prolonged closure of the Strait of Hormuz have caused a rise in Asian oil prices on Thursday. Wright emphasized that the situation is temporary, noting that global oil supplies are ample, reserves are abundant, and U.S. oil production has reached record highs. He assured that the U.S. Navy would soon escort tankers through the strait, which carries about one-fifth of the world's daily oil consumption.

data.title: India's Rupee Strengthens Following Central Bank Intervention
data.description: India's rupee saw significant gains on Thursday, marking the largest advance among Asian currencies. Bloomberg posted on X that this development comes after the central bank intervened to support the currency, which had reached a record low the previous day. The intervention highlights the central bank's commitment to stabilizing the rupee amidst ongoing economic challenges.

data.title: Sahara AI Unveils 2026 Strategic Roadmap for AI Evolution
data.description:
Sahara AI has officially announced its strategic roadmap for 2026. According to Odaily, the company aims to transition AI from conversational capabilities to autonomous execution through its investment agent Sorin and the locally deployed tool ClawApp, based on OpenClaw. The underlying architecture will incorporate long-term memory for agents, multi-agent collaboration networks, and protocol layer automatic settlement, creating a seamless on-chain value transfer loop.

Currently, Sahara AI serves over 40 leading institutions, including Microsoft, Amazon, and MIT, generating revenue in the tens of millions of dollars. By 2026, the company is committed to evolving AI from an assistant to autonomous productivity, enhancing life experiences while fostering a fair and open decentralized agentic economy.

data.title: Japan Raises Travel Warning Levels for UAE and Qatar
data.description: Japan has elevated its travel warning levels for the United Arab Emirates and Qatar, reflecting heightened caution for travelers. According to Jin10, this decision comes amid ongoing geopolitical tensions and regional uncertainties. The Japanese government advises citizens to exercise increased vigilance when visiting these countries, although specific reasons for the heightened warnings were not disclosed. Travelers are encouraged to stay informed about local developments and adhere to any safety guidelines issued by authorities.

data.title: SK Hynix Maintains Sufficient Helium Supply Amid Iran Crisis
data.description: SK Hynix has announced that it possesses an adequate inventory of helium, ensuring that the ongoing crisis in Iran will not impact its operations. According to Jin10, the company has taken measures to secure its supply chain against potential disruptions. The assurance comes amid concerns over the geopolitical tensions in the Middle East, which have raised questions about the stability of helium supplies. SK Hynix's proactive approach highlights its commitment to maintaining steady production and mitigating risks associated with external geopolitical factors.

data.title: STOCKS | India's Sensex Index Opens with Gains
data.description: India's Sensex index opened with a 0.5% increase, reaching 79,530.48 points. According to Jin10, this rise reflects positive market sentiment as investors react to recent economic developments. The Sensex, a key indicator of the Indian stock market, has shown resilience amid global economic uncertainties. Analysts suggest that this upward trend may continue if favorable conditions persist.

data.title: India Seeks to Alleviate Debt Burden with Strategic Measures
data.description: India is taking steps to manage its substantial debt obligations that are set to mature in the coming years. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the government's efforts to mitigate the financial strain from these liabilities. The strategy involves a combination of refinancing and extending the maturity of existing debts to ensure economic stability. This approach aims to reduce the immediate fiscal pressure and provide a more manageable timeline for debt repayment. The move is part of a broader plan to maintain fiscal health and support economic growth amid global financial uncertainties.
